title: Server Optimizer
description: A simple fabric pack to optimize server performance, also include some additional QOL mods
body:
# Server Optimizer

A lightweight **Fabric modpack** designed to **improve server performance** while including a few helpful **quality-of-life (QOL) enhancements**.

## Features

* **Server-side performance improvements**

* **Quality of Life mods**
  Includes lightweight utility mods that improve the experience without breaking vanilla gameplay.
